ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game in the format 'Home-Away' */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with these statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game these statistics belong to */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fg" TEXT /* Field goals made and attempted (e.g., '2-7') */,
  "three_pt" TEXT /* Three-point field goals made and attempted (e.g., '0-0') */,
  "ft" TEXT /* Free throws made and attempted (e.g., '0-0') */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic entry being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the result belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that achieved this score */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score achieved by the team in the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the injury */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the scouting report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
